---
title: '博客'
subtitle: '所思、所学、所得。'
sidebar: false
toc: false
back-to-top-navigation: false
reading-meta-enabled: false

listing:
    id: blogs-listing
    contents: "*/index.*md"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    fields: [image, title, categories, author, date]
    grid-columns: 2
    image-height: "12rem"
    image-align: left
    # image-placeholder: 'https://placeholderimage.io/api/800/600/people/679977/333333/85d2d1/FFFFFF/png'  # img-plchd: many people
    image-placeholder: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Pinn32/img/main/placeholders/Blog.png'
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 20
---
